title: Silky Slovakian Oreo Bowl
description: A comforting, earthy Slovakian twist on Oreo cream biscuits, steam-cooked to create a silky texture while remaining diabetic-friendly.

ingredients.name: Slovakian Oreo cream biscuits
ingredients.notes: Use plain, low-sugar variants for diabetic safety

ingredients.name: Earth-friendly seasoning
ingredients.notes: Dried herbs like caraway or dill for earthy flavor

instructions: Place 25g Slovakian Oreo cream biscuits in a heat-safe bowl.
Add 100ml water for steaming and 5g earth-friendly seasoning.
Cover tightly with a lid and steam over medium heat for 5 minutes.
Let cool slightly, then serve warm for a silky texture.
